ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Chinese — Multimodal presentation

descriptors:
comprehension of ideas in three stimulus texts in Chinese related to the present and/or
future choices

comprehension of ideas in two stimulus texts in Chinese related to the present and/or
future choices

some comprehension of ideas in one stimulus text in Chinese related to the present and/or
future choices
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Chinese — Responding (communication)

descriptors:
communicates with discerning selection, sequencing and synthesis of information from the
stimulus texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text
type of the multimodal presentation

stimulus texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text
type of the multimodal presentation

texts to justify conclusions, ideas and perspectives appropriate to the task and text type of
the multimodal presentation

communicates with some selection and sequencing of information from the stimulus texts
with some justification of conclusions/ideas/perspectives appropriate to the task of the
multimodal presentation

a multimodal presentation with some selection and sequencing of information/ideas from
the stimulus texts
disjointed use of Chinese
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Exchanging information and ideas in Chinese — Creating and responding

descriptors: thorough and discerning responses to the open, unseen interview questions
thorough comprehensive responses to the open, unseen interview questions
relevant responses to the open, unseen interview questions, with some errors
mostly relevant responses to the open, unseen interview questions, with repeated errors
fragmented engagement with the questions posed
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

demonstrates effective selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview with proficiency

demonstrates selection and sequencing of ideas in an interview with some proficiency
